topic: solar exposure and red-grape colour development
trigger_keywords: clima influye directamente en la acumulación de color en uvas tintas

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Red grape bunches receive suitable sunlight exposure during ripening.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Light supports anthocyanin synthesis and skin maturation, provided exposure is not so extreme that heat or sunburn causes degradation.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Colour accumulation in the skins can increase and support deeper colour in the resulting red wine.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Colour accumulation in the skins can increase and support deeper colour in the resulting red wine.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
